description_long: This is a weathered stone headstone, rectangular with a rounded top and mounted on a slightly raised stone base. The front face features engraved symbols, including an anchor and crossed bones, as well as a shield-like crest at the top, all partially covered in moss and lichen. The stone surface shows signs of age, with streaks of greenish discoloration and erosion, especially near the base. The back of the headstone has a lengthy inscription, though some of the text is faded and difficult to read due to weathering. The headstone stands upright and is embedded in a patch of earth, suggesting it is fixed in place. The overall appearance is somber and historic, typical of older grave markers found in traditional cemeteries.
description: A weathered stone headstone with engraved symbols and inscriptions, covered in moss and set on a stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing engraved symbols, a crest, and weathered stone surface with moss.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the headstone and the stone base embedded in the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a lengthy, faded inscription and streaks of discoloration from age.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone's thickness and surface texture with visible lichen.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: IN MEMORY OF HIS SON JOHN
